description: Clutch is a B2B marketplace and ratings platform for finding, comparing, and evaluating service providers using verified client reviews, rankings, and service listings. It also offers AI-agent access to its provider, review, and package data through a hosted MCP server.
summary: Clutch.co publicly exposes a no-auth remote MCP server at https://bot.clutch.co/mcp for AI agents; I found no developer-facing HTTP/GraphQL API or CLI on clutch.co itself beyond terms mentioning a contractual API without public docs/endpoints.
